country:barabea.description: Barabea, a city of Ereb Altor. A compendium of the known world of Altor — its regions, cities, histories, and secrets.

pin:rapulin.description: Rapulin, a city of Ereb Altor. A compendium of the known world of Altor — its regions, cities, histories, and secrets.

country:rapulin.title: Rapulin — The Altor Codex
country:rapulin.description: Rapulin, a city of Ereb Altor. A compendium of the known world of Altor — its regions, cities, histories, and secrets.

adventure:a-cry-from-the-past.title: A Cry from the Past — The Altor Codex
adventure:a-cry-from-the-past.description: A ghost you cannot fight, only help: free the girl her own father walled up alive, and every haunting for miles ends with her.

adventure:andadax.title: Andadax — The Altor Codex
adventure:andadax.description: A free village under the forest-god's eye.

adventure:beauty-and-the-beast.title: Beauty and the Beast — The Altor Codex
adventure:beauty-and-the-beast.description: Thinking, not the sword, opens the drowned temple.

adventure:black-duel.title: Black Duel — The Altor Codex
adventure:black-duel.description: Slip onto the cursed island and put an end to the wizard Telach.

adventure:blood-sacrifice.title: Blood Sacrifice — The Altor Codex
adventure:blood-sacrifice.description: A dying monk's map leads into the temple of the dark god, where captive brothers wait upon the sacrificial knife.

adventure:day-of-wrath.title: Day of Wrath — The Altor Codex
adventure:day-of-wrath.description: An archangel walks Krilloan by night, killing sinners one by one toward a four-hundred-year-old prophecy, and there may be no way to stop him but to raise a devil out of one of your own.

adventure:deaths-road.title: Death's Road — The Altor Codex
adventure:deaths-road.description: A blade vanished from a locked vault, and the only man with cause to take it has been dead three hundred years.

adventure:enemies-of-the-beginning.title: Enemies of the Beginning — The Altor Codex
adventure:enemies-of-the-beginning.description: The commandant's son is gone, the mob is burning necromancers in the streets, and behind it all wait an old animist's fifty-year grudge and a dragon raised from the dead.

adventure:finngaoth.title: Finngaoth — The Altor Codex
adventure:finngaoth.description: The temple has the right kind of smell.

adventure:haktahchas-arrival.title: Haktahcha's Arrival — The Altor Codex
adventure:haktahchas-arrival.description: Two ingredients, two warring bands, and a demon waiting at the bottom of the world.

adventure:horrors-of-the-deep.title: Horrors of the Deep — The Altor Codex
adventure:horrors-of-the-deep.description: No caravan has reached the city in a month, and the dead are walking the trade road.

adventure:intermezzo-in-gabrika.title: Intermezzo in Gabrika — The Altor Codex
adventure:intermezzo-in-gabrika.description: Two masters, each paying to be rid of the other.

adventure:jeraz.title: Jeraz — The Altor Codex
adventure:jeraz.description: Five hundred years on, the gate to Chaos still leaks demons into the ruins of Asiki.

adventure:kandra.title: Kandra — The Altor Codex
adventure:kandra.description: An account of the bustling trading city of Kandra and the powers that run it.

adventure:kasyr.title: Kasyr — The Altor Codex
adventure:kasyr.description: The isle where men are merchandise.

adventure:krugal-svylses-curse.title: Krugal Svylse's Curse — The Altor Codex
adventure:krugal-svylses-curse.description: A dead prankster's joke-dungeon, a cursed map that brings the rain, and a treasure guarded by riddles instead of swords.

adventure:melindors-return.title: Melindor's Return — The Altor Codex
adventure:melindors-return.description: A golden nut to save a dying king, and a crown won at a terrible price.

adventure:moril-dilaz.title: Moril Dilaz — The Altor Codex
adventure:moril-dilaz.description: The canal-city, where the streets are water.

adventure:nightmare-in-darkness.title: Nightmare in Darkness — The Altor Codex
adventure:nightmare-in-darkness.description: Hunt down the saboteurs wrecking a dwarven silver mine: a job that is a trap, for the saboteurs are in the right and the masters who hired you are the oppressors.

adventure:playing-with-fire.title: Playing with Fire — The Altor Codex
adventure:playing-with-fire.description: A broken demon-rite, a band of fugitives blamed for the killings, and a stolen girl who must be found before the eleventh moon.

adventure:shadow-of-a-rose.title: Shadow of a Rose — The Altor Codex
adventure:shadow-of-a-rose.description: A dying stranger presses a silver chalice into your hands, and with it the holiest relic of a death-goddess's cult and every killer in Krilloan at your heels.

adventure:shadows-over-nohstril.title: Shadows over Nohstril — The Altor Codex
adventure:shadows-over-nohstril.description: A simple burglary draws the heroes into a spy-war, a string of mage-murders, and a plot to raise a betrayed war-demon under the city.

adventure:shamashs-finger.title: Shamash's Finger — The Altor Codex
adventure:shamashs-finger.description: A crystal cliff drinks the world's spilled magic, and the truth of it is worth killing for.

adventure:siratsias-white-spellbook.title: Siratsia's White Spellbook — The Altor Codex
adventure:siratsias-white-spellbook.description: Seize the white book and burn it - for only dragon-fire can unmake it.

adventure:sulphur-winter.title: Sulphur Winter — The Altor Codex
adventure:sulphur-winter.description: On the remote volcanic island of Marjura, the realm of Trakorien holds the sulphur trade with convict labour while the necromantic shagulite sect schemes from its hidden Iron Tower. Into this web of…

adventure:the-academy-at-grynnerbergen.title: The Academy at Grynnerbergen — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-academy-at-grynnerbergen.description: A crag of magicians, won by fire and lightning.

adventure:the-auction.title: The Auction — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-auction.description: A box bought back at a thieves' auction holds a dagger that has already chosen one of you.

adventure:the-copper-ring.title: The Copper Ring — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-copper-ring.description: A murdered teacher, a drug-den full of screaming heads, and a copper ring that will open a door for a demon-prince.

adventure:the-copper-sea-raiders.title: The Copper Sea Raiders — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-copper-sea-raiders.description: A disgraced baron turned pirate, a galleon that outruns anything afloat, and an island no honest ship comes back from.

adventure:the-crystal-bull.title: The Crystal Bull — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-crystal-bull.description: To save the world, first find the way out of it.

adventure:the-dead-city-of-gideon.title: The Dead City of Gideon — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-dead-city-of-gideon.description: Where the undead keep their vigil over a chained god.

adventure:the-dead-forest.title: The Dead Forest — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-dead-forest.description: Lured by honour and gold, adventurers enter a cursed forest in search of the keys to the legendary Gates of Power.

adventure:the-demon-prince.title: The Demon Prince — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-demon-prince.description: Chase a fleeing demon through a hole in the world, and learn too late whose war you have been fighting all along.

adventure:the-dragon-flute.title: The Dragon Flute — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-dragon-flute.description: A flute that opens the road into death, and a dragon who will lend it for a price.

adventure:the-dyler-invasion.title: The Dyler Invasion — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-dyler-invasion.description: The Dyler mean to take back their city. That is not the truth.

adventure:the-edelfara-triangle.title: The Edelfara Triangle — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-edelfara-triangle.description: A murdered courier, a stolen chest of gold, and three feuding nobles each blaming the other two, while the one who set them at each other's throats waits in the forest for them to bleed each other wh…

adventure:the-eingreen-castle.title: The Eingreen Castle — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-eingreen-castle.description: Burned villages, an innocent people blamed, and the truth festering in a ruin no one dares enter: a chaos-gate left ajar.

adventure:the-elementary-academy.title: The Elementary Academy — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-elementary-academy.description: The grandest building in Nohstril, the House of the Eightfold Way, home to the Elementary Academy and its masters of the eight elements - with a hall of uncanny mirrors, a library guarded by ice, and…

adventure:the-fate-lottery.title: The Fate Lottery — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-fate-lottery.description: A rich man fears the lottery will name him outlaw, and hires a face to take his place.

adventure:the-feud-of-sharfal-and-dudhil.title: The Feud of Sharfal and Dudhil — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-feud-of-sharfal-and-dudhil.description: A hundred years of hatred, and two who would end it.

adventure:the-fifth-conflux.title: The Fifth Conflux — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-fifth-conflux.description: Whoever is closest to the conflux wins. Everything else is the long, hard road to get there.

adventure:the-final-battle.title: The Final Battle — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-final-battle.description: To end the archmage, first summon the light that answers his dark.

adventure:the-gates-of-power.title: The Gates of Power — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-gates-of-power.description: Picking up where the Dead Forest left off, the three keys turn in the Gates of Power and a band of adventurers descends into the dwarven realm that has stood abandoned for seven hundred years.

adventure:the-ghost-general.title: The Ghost General — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-ghost-general.description: A lord turns cruel and strange behind his moats, and only the dead know why.

adventure:the-golden-dagger.title: The Golden Dagger — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-golden-dagger.description: Three murders in three months, each killing worth a small fortune in the blade left behind.

adventure:the-harpies-nest.title: The Harpies' Nest — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-harpies-nest.description: A sheer volcanic crag in the western Copper Sea, ringed with reefs and the wrecks of ships that tried to take it, where the pirate Piet Steeljaw keeps his hidden base.

adventure:the-heart-of-darkness.title: The Heart of Darkness — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-heart-of-darkness.description: The third and final part of the trilogy that began in the Dead Forest. Carried out of the dwarven realm into the war-torn Eastlands, a band of heroes is swept into an epic struggle between light and…

adventure:the-hell-fort.title: The Hell Fort — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-hell-fort.description: The Cleansing was never late. It is almost here.

adventure:the-high-tower.title: The High Tower — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-high-tower.description: A spell tore a door to another world, and the old mage who opened it cannot hold it shut much longer.

adventure:the-holy-god-wine.title: The Holy God-Wine — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-holy-god-wine.description: Help us find it before the curse takes us.

adventure:the-lost-zepelond.title: The Lost Zepelond — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-lost-zepelond.description: An idle noble's airship drifts over forbidden Kargom, and the poison-brewers who seize it mean to kill the living wall.

adventure:the-marshland.title: The Marshland — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-marshland.description: Eighty islands in a trackless delta, and a crystal orb that enslaves any hand that holds it.

adventure:the-merchant-prince.title: The Merchant Prince — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-merchant-prince.description: Hired to spy on a rival merchant house in a far archipelago of masked clans, a band of adventurers is made the unwitting tool of a massacre and then its scapegoat, and must bring down the house that…

adventure:the-misty-island.title: The Misty Island — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-misty-island.description: Across a fog-bound island and the village of Outskirt, an old secret waits beneath the ground for any who dare to seek it.

adventure:the-nova-stone.title: The Nova Stone — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-nova-stone.description: Three trails lead from the inn at Utmir, and only one tells the truth.

adventure:the-oathbreakers-of-erebos.title: The Oathbreakers of Erebos — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-oathbreakers-of-erebos.description: A ruined merchant on a bridge's edge, a cargo of dwarf-swords that never arrived, and a great trading house selling weapons to the enemy.

adventure:the-oracles-four-eyes.title: The Oracle's Four Eyes — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-oracles-four-eyes.description: Four seers must be saved before the assassins find them - and the fifth conflux falls into the wrong hands.

adventure:the-sea-wolves.title: The Sea Wolves — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-sea-wolves.description: A Jorduashur sea-captain hires the band as rowers for a raid on a robber chieftain's coastal fastness in the wild north of Kardien, three hundred miles of open water and a three-day march from home.

adventure:the-secret-of-gripeborg.title: The Secret of Gripeborg — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-secret-of-gripeborg.description: A marquis vanished into his own cellar, a sword lost to the dark, and a demon laughing at the foot of the stair.

adventure:the-shoguns-wrath.title: The Shogun's Wrath — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-shoguns-wrath.description: Something is infiltrating the shogun's mines, and the trail runs through a murder, a web of bribes, and a fortress inside a burning mountain.

adventure:the-skeleton-villages-secret.title: The Skeleton Village's Secret — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-skeleton-villages-secret.description: A murdered priest's ghost begs you to cleanse the ruined village he died for, where tireless skeletons walk a fixed patrol over the grave of a nameless knight and the church treasure he died defendin…

adventure:the-spider-kings-pyramid.title: The Spider King's Pyramid — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-spider-kings-pyramid.description: Four hundred years sealed, the tomb of a sorcerer-king who rode giant spiders to war waits beside the caravan road, and a band of mountain diggers is already tunnelling toward its treasure from below.

adventure:the-stolen-elephant.title: The Stolen Elephant — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-stolen-elephant.description: A blueprint worth killing for, lost inside a chattering landlady's piggy bank.

adventure:the-tattooer-of-kargom.title: The Tattooer of Kargom — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-tattooer-of-kargom.description: A master inker comes to port, and the marks he leaves carry the werewolf's curse.

adventure:the-temple-lord.title: The Temple Lord — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-temple-lord.description: A cult of death has put on the robes of the church, and it is steering the islands toward war.

adventure:the-twin-mountains.title: The Twin Mountains — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-twin-mountains.description: Two wizard-brothers murdered their own fathers and marched north to war, leaving the old men's treasure sealed in a trap-laced burial mound between the Twin Mountains, where every guardian and every…

adventure:the-unicorn-and-the-dragon-ser.title: The Unicorn and the Dragon-Serpent — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-unicorn-and-the-dragon-ser.description: Sign on as a mercenary in a peasant rebellion, and find a half-demon sorcerer plotting to teleport a fallen comet and end the world.

adventure:the-unicorn-horn.title: The Unicorn Horn — The Altor Codex
adventure:the-unicorn-horn.description: A small order of healing priestesses sends seekers into the city of Kandra to recover relics tied to a unicorn, before darker hands can claim them.

adventure:the-voice-from-the-ancient-pas.title: The Voice from the Ancient Past — The Altor Codex

adventure:timar.title: Timar — The Altor Codex
adventure:timar.description: The clifftop-fortress, ruled from the shadows.

adventure:what-happened-next.title: What Happened Next? — The Altor Codex
adventure:what-happened-next.description: The dark lord is dead, and now the real war begins: famine, a coming winter, broken alliances, and a demon raising one last army, for there are no happy endings, only crises that come and go.

adventure:zygosunds-bridge.title: Zygosund's Bridge — The Altor Codex
adventure:zygosunds-bridge.description: A dwarven span the dark folk could not break.
